name: Gadget Demonstration
environment_block: modern home office or tech setup with clean desk surface, RGB lighting elements, tech gadgets in background, minimalist aesthetic, cool blue and purple lighting accents
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera with close-up product shots, handheld framing with smooth zoom transitions, natural hand movement showing gadget features, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator demonstrates gadget features with close-up shots, shows multiple functions and use cases, natural excitement when features work, pauses to explain benefits to camera
performance_block: enthusiastic tech review energy, genuine curiosity and excitement, natural eye contact with camera during explanations, authentic reactions to gadget capabilities
platform_block: realistic TikTok tech review style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, fast social-media pacing, authentic tech enthusiast vibe
lighting_block: RGB ambient lighting or soft monitor glow, tech setup environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright gadget elements
motion_block: smooth gadget rotations, natural hand movements when demonstrating features, authentic excitement reactions, casual body shifting
audio_block: subtle gadget click sounds, tech setup ambience, keyboard typing sounds, authentic enthusiastic speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no corporate tech presenter aesthetic, no overly polished production
